html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Watermelon Plant is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Square Seeds (also named Watermelon Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow a Watermelon Plant by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite seasons are Spring and Summer, so in Autumn and Winter it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Watermelon and 0-2 Square/Watermelon Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Watermelon, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Watermelons and 2-3 Square/Watermelon Seeds.

The Watermelon stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Watermelon stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Watermelon Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Watermelon Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Watermelon Plant in Plant Registry.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cây Dưa Hấu là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Reap What You Sow. Nó có thể thu được bằng cách trồng Square Seeds (còn có tên là Watermelon Seeds, nếu được nghiên cứu bằng Gardeneer Hat) vào Farm Soil hoặc trên mặt đất như Wormwood. Có cơ hội trồng Cây dưa hấu bằng cách gieo Hạt giống thông thường.

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Watermelon Plant''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Square Seeds|Square Seeds]] (also named Watermelon Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow a Watermelon Plant by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite seasons are [[Spring]] and [[Summer]], so in [[Autumn]] and [[Winter]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Watermelon/DST|Watermelon]] and 0-2 Square/Watermelon Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Watermelon|Giant Watermelon]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Watermelons and 2-3 Square/Watermelon Seeds.

The Watermelon stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Watermelon stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Watermelon Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Watermelon Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
